Locate the ggbrat resource cache

ggbrat_cache_dir.Rd

Locate the ggbrat resource cache

Usage

ggbrat_cache_dir(create = TRUE)

Arguments

create

Whether to create the directory if necessary.

Value

The normalized cache path.
